title: rhododendron × russelianum f. album
intro: Rhododendron × russelianum f. album, also known as the Russian rhododendron, is a hybrid plant species that is part of the rhododendron family. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Chinese and Japanese cultures, for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The Russian rhododendron is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and supporting immune function. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
